about_us_content.developer_callout:
This platform is brought to you by **Lady Zainab Foundation**, a 501(c)(3) non-profit based in New Jersey, in partnership with **Pent-AI-Efficient Solutions**.
Our scholars pour their lives into unpacking the teachings of the Holy Quran and Ahlul Bayt (AS). We built this platform so that none of that work is lost — every lecture captured, summarized, and made accessible to anyone, anywhere, at any time.
But we didn’t stop at content. Running a community center takes real effort — managing events, sending announcements, coordinating donations, keeping members engaged. This platform handles those tasks too, so administrators can spend less time on logistics and more time on what actually matters.
Technology should serve the mission, not complicate it. That’s the idea behind everything we build.
If you’d like to bring this platform to your center, or simply want to learn more, reach out to **Lady Zainab Foundation** (Zainab.imam.bargah@gmail.com) or **Pent-AI-Efficient Solutions** (penta.efficient.solutions@gmail.com). And if this work speaks to you, we’d be grateful for your support in expanding it to more communities.
